intro: Triaenophora integra is a flowering plant species commonly known as the "Globe Daisy" or "White Daisy Bush", native to Australia. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, infections, and digestive issues. Bioactive constituents of Triaenophora integra include alkaloids, glycosides, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
